creator: sergey@akhmatov.ru
text:
Created attachment 223052
py-ncclient-0.6.10

Update net-mgmt/py-ncclient to 0.6.10

Changes: https://github.com/ncclient/ncclient/releases/tag/v0.6.10
- NETCONF call-home (RFC8071) support
- YANG 1.1 action support
- Nokia SR OS device handler support
- Removal of old ALU base-r13 API documentation
- Increased test coverage
- Variety of bugfixes and minor enhancements from a variety of contributors

QA: Poudriere testport on 11.4, 12.2 and 13.0
